terms.definition: The pandas/numpy type of a column (e.g. int32, float32, category, string) that determines memory use and allowed operations.
pandas function to parse comma-separated text files into a DataFrame, with optional dtype, encoding, and column selection.
A columnar binary storage format with embedded types and compression, read efficiently by pandas via PyArrow or fastparquet.
Parameter on read functions limiting which columns are loaded from disk, reducing I/O and memory.
DataFrame method reporting per-column bytes; with deep=True includes object string contents for accurate totals.
A text format with one JSON object per line, commonly loaded via read_json(..., lines=True).
